steps.expected: Response contains all original fields (chain, token, block, price, cached) plus additive block_timestamp
steps.observed: Response: {chain, token, block, price, cached, block_timestamp} — all original fields present, block_timestamp added as superset field

evidence.responseHeaders: HTTP/1.1 200 OK, Content-Type: application/json, x-request-id: utv-ne-cross-001b

assertions.title: Error envelope consistent across all endpoints

evidence.network: All 400 responses use {"error": "..."} format, not FastAPI {"detail": ...}

steps.expected: cached:false, amount request should NOT write to cache
cached:false (amount request should not have written to cache)
steps.observed: cached:false — confirmed amount request did NOT write to cache

evidence.network: Step 1: GET /price?...&amount=500&skip_cache=true -> 200 cached:false; Step 2: GET /price?... -> 200 cached:false (confirming amount request did not cache)

steps.expected: Counters for /prices and /check_bucket with status labels
steps.observed: batch_requests_total{chain="ethereum",status="ok"} incremented 13->14 after /prices hit; check_bucket_requests_total{chain="ethereum",status="ok"} incremented 5->6 after /check_bucket hit

evidence.batchDuration: batch_request_duration_seconds histogram present with chain label
evidence.network: GET /ethereum/metrics/ -> 200 text/plain with Prometheus exposition format

steps.observed: Response header: x-request-id: utv-ne-cross-006a — echoed correctly
Response header: x-request-id: utv-ne-cross-006b — echoed correctly

steps.expected: Server generates a UUID for x-request-id

evidence.network: All three requests returned x-request-id header

evidence.pricesOptions: HTTP/1.1 200 OK, access-control-allow-origin: *, access-control-allow-methods: GET, OPTIONS, access-control-max-age: 600
evidence.checkBucketOptions: HTTP/1.1 200 OK, access-control-allow-origin: *, access-control-allow-methods: GET, OPTIONS, access-control-max-age: 600
evidence.network: OPTIONS and GET requests return proper CORS headers for both new endpoints

assertions.title: OpenAPI spec includes new endpoints and params

steps.expected: /prices, /check_bucket, and /price with new params (skip_cache, ignore_pools, silent, timestamp)
steps.observed: Paths: /health, /price, /prices, /check_bucket, /. /price has params: token, block, amount, skip_cache, ignore_pools, silent, timestamp. /prices has params: tokens, block, amounts, timestamp, skip_cache, silent. /check_bucket has params: token.

steps.action: Check for static openapi.json in repo
steps.expected: Static file updated or replaced by auto-generation
steps.observed: Static openapi.json was intentionally removed in commit 753a4d2 (cross-area-polish) in favor of FastAPI auto-generation. Scrutiny review approved this as a better approach.

evidence.staticFile: Removed in favor of auto-generation (commit 753a4d2). No drift possible.
evidence.network: GET /ethereum/openapi.json -> 200 (note: /openapi.json at nginx root returns 404; must use chain-specific path)

assertions.issues: OpenAPI spec only accessible via chain-specific path (/ethereum/openapi.json), not at root /openapi.json (nginx 404). This is expected due to nginx routing architecture.

frictions.description: /metrics endpoint not routed at nginx root level; must use chain-specific path /ethereum/metrics/ (with trailing slash). /ethereum/metrics without trailing slash returns 307 redirect.
frictions.resolution: Used /ethereum/metrics/ with trailing slash and -L flag to follow redirects

frictions.description: /openapi.json not routed at nginx root level; must use chain-specific path /ethereum/openapi.json
frictions.resolution: Used /ethereum/openapi.json to access the auto-generated spec

frictions.description: Token addresses appear redacted (42 asterisks) in some responses — existing logger behavior noted in user-testing.md
frictions.resolution: Known quirk; does not affect assertion evaluation as address is still accepted and priced correctly

summary: Tested 7 assertions: all 7 passed. VAL-CROSS-001 (backwards-compatible response shape), VAL-CROSS-002 (error envelope consistency), VAL-CROSS-004 (skip_cache+amount interaction), VAL-CROSS-005 (Prometheus metrics for new endpoints), VAL-CROSS-006 (X-Request-ID propagation), VAL-CROSS-007 (CORS on new endpoints), VAL-CROSS-009 (OpenAPI spec completeness). No failures or blockers.
